query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_contracts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'หนี้เสีย' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as bad_debt_contracts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN bad_debt_amount > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as contracts_with_bad_debt_amount,
  SUM(bad_debt_amount) as total_bad_debt_amount
FROM contracts
WHERE section = 'boonphone';
